accurate.why: All claims match the bill text (rule, agency, Fed. Reg. cite, dates) and the CRA context is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; descriptions of the disapproval effect and timing are supported by the bill and CRA.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose is congressional disapproval/nullification of the DOE commercial refrigeration energy conservation rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the resolution acts under chapter 8 of title 5 (CRA) and nullifies the specified DOE rule.

exceptions_conditions.why: This simple CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions, conditions, or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Correctly cites the rule's January 21, 2025 publication and the May 9, 2025 approval date when disapproval took effect.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative provision: Congress disapproves the rule and it shall have no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive, with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across purpose, provision, and legislative history.

concise.why: Brief and focused without significant padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: DOE's Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy, the rule title, and the CRA citation are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation (90 Fed. Reg. 7464), publication date, passage dates, and approval date all match the bill text.
